parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;

const prompt = [
  'You are an experienced teacher evaluating a student homework response.',
  'Your job is to judge how well the student understood the topic taught in class.',
  'Use the lesson plan, lesson metadata, homework task, and student homework answer.',
  'Return ONLY raw JSON. Do not use markdown, code fences, comments, or explanation.',
  '',
  'CRITICAL JSON RULES:',
  '- Return valid JSON only.',
  '- Every key must use double quotes.',
  '- Every string must use double quotes.',
  '- Do not use trailing commas.',
  '',
  'EVALUATION RULES:',
  '- Do not grade only grammar or length.',
  '- Focus mainly on understanding of the lesson topic.',
  '- Check whether the student response connects to what was taught in the lesson plan.',
  '- Be kind, specific, and useful.',
  '- Do not invent facts about the student.',
  '- Do not give marks out of total marks.',
  '- Use understanding_score from 1 to 5 only.',
  '- understanding_level must be one of: Excellent, Good, Developing, Needs Support.',
  '- Give feedback suitable for the student grade level.',
  '- strengths must include 1-3 short points.',
  '- improvements must include 1-3 short points.',
  '- teacher_note should briefly tell the teacher what the student seems to understand or miss.',
  '',
  'LESSON METADATA:',
  JSON.stringify(d.metadata),
  '',
  'LESSON PLAN:',
  JSON.stringify(d.lesson_plan),
  '',
  'HOMEWORK TASK:',
  d.homework_task,
  '',
  'STUDENT HOMEWORK ANSWER:',
  d.homework_answer,
  '',
  'Return JSON in this exact structure:',
  JSON.stringify({
    success: true,
    submission_id: d.submission_id,
    understanding_level: 'Excellent/Good/Developing/Needs Support',
    understanding_score: 4,
    feedback: 'Student-facing feedback explaining what they understood and what to improve.',
    strengths: [
      'Strength 1',
      'Strength 2'
    ],
    improvements: [
      'Improvement 1',
      'Improvement 2'
    ],
    teacher_note: 'Short teacher-facing note about the student understanding.'
  }),
].join('\n');

return [
  {
    json: {
      submission_id: d.submission_id,
      requestBody: {
        model: 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-001',
        messages: [
          {
            role: 'user',
            content: prompt,
          },
        ],
        temperature: 0.1,
        max_tokens: 8000,
        response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
      },
    },
  },
];
